title: Dual-dye shulkers
description: Apply different colors to the top and bottom of shulker boxes
body:
# 🎨 Dual-Dye Shulkers

**Unlock 256 extra color combinations!** Apply different colors to the **lid** and **base** of shulker boxes separately.
![All 16 colors on dyed on shulkers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3506e9668f9194172dd14a9b04454d14087b8f8f.png)
---

## 🕹️ How to Use

- **Color the Lid** — Hold any dye + `Shift + Right-click`
- **Color the Base** — Hold any dye + `Ctrl + Right-click`  
- **Reset Colors** — Dunk in a water cauldron

> 💡 Key combos are fully customizable in the config menu!

---

## 💡 Perfect For

- 📁 Color-coding storage systems
- 🏗️ Building & decoration
- 🎨 Making every shulker unique

---

## 📦 Requirements

| Mod | Status |
|-----|--------|
| [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) | **Required** |
| [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) | Optional (for config screen) |
| [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) | Optional (for config access) |
